author: BlackSmokeMonster
title: Battery Hog, Feed Worse than Browser
content: I only install the actual Facebook app when I need to use Facebook Marketplace. I’ve noticed my battery life on my iPhone and past iPhones is much worse with the app installed. Also, the feed has more irrelevant “suggested content” from creators I have no connection to, as well as seemingly more ads than when viewing Facebook through the Safari Browser.

I feel like I’m getting picked on which happened on instagram before. Also fave is becoming less fun each day. And lies are keep spreading.

author: JT5678648864464656
title: Extremely Addictive
content:
Social media is extremely addictive. Facebook is a tribal, compartmentalized, social order that is all fake. It’s designed from the ground up to hook you and make you spend your time and money and it will give you nothing but temporary and fleeting dopamine hits in return. 

It is also a gateway drug. An addiction to social media is only one step away from an addiction to pornography. You will be exposed to immodest images guaranteed. 

If you want real connection I recommend a phone call, FaceTime, or meeting in person. 

Do not waist your time and your life away on this app.

author: Gio.MSN.RN
title: Missing Liquid Glass
content: Since the Liquid Glass began, Facebook has not yet done what is relevant to implement the Liquid Glass. WhatsApp already has it and FB and Instagram have not changed this function yet. There are still scratches in FB app, it has to be more interactive and faster.

author: VMahoney 12
title: The scheduled posting feature sucks.
content: It will post multiple times on my feed, it’s sloppy

author: SakeJoto
title: Not very user friendly
content: I’ve had 3 accounts, every time my account has ended up permanently disabled due to “violating community guidelines”, the notification that I violated community guidelines cites a sub section I can’t find in the guidelines nor does Facebook show or tell me what I posted or said that actually violated the guidelines. I will not be making another account. The whole app is a big waste of time anyways, I can network with friends on other platforms more efficiently anyways. It was cool to have a Facebook back in 2010 but it’s no longer relevant given my experience with not being able to maintain an active account.

content: The site is embarrassingly dedicated to AI divisiveness and is full of hate material on both sides of the fence. I honestly hope that it fades away with this generation.

author: _ReezY_
title: Questionable updates
content: I recently just redownloaded FB, it won’t allow me to use my birth given name, that’s a little frustrating and the fact I have to alter my name consider this is the only meta platform I’ve ever had the issue with. Pretty questionable.

author: Pretty stone face
title: Notifications are a mess
content: It keeps sending me false data about notifications. I see the red dot with the number. I open the app and check notifications to see absolutely nothing new. I make a point to mark all as read. An hour later it’s the same thing. I feel like I’m being deceived to drive traffic and ultimately create ad revenue for META. Maybe if we weren’t so addicted to social media we wouldn’t need all these data centers. Send a real message to Zuckerberg and get off your phone and build your community with face to face instead.

author: Leonitus79
title: Bring back social networking apps
content:
This is a tabloid forcing invasive trash no one ever wants to see to the user over and over and over and over and over and over and over and over and over and over again…

Remember when you literally saw what people you actually connected to and followed posted and only what they chose to share and pages had to be opted into before you saw their content and you only saw those pages you opted into’s content?

Now good luck seeing anything from people you actually stay on the app to keep up with…

It’s a never ending whiplash of repetitive drivel and basically the worst tabloid you could ever subscribe to.

No thanks Zuckmeister, I’ll leave you to destroy the rest of this once great nation in peace.

author: Outdoor Janitor
title: Enjoy friends, hate censorship:
content:
I’m updating this review today, 6/17/26, much more positively; perhaps since #Trump is prez, and pushed back on Obiden-era censorship, I see much more diversity of opinion; & haven’t been put in “facebook jail;” as happened during COVID.  Seems like I’m getting more engagement with friends; still occasional censorship of items you don’t approve of, by a sly means: namely throttling some messages when direct-messaging links, you allow only 5-at-a-time for conservative or controversial posts. 

But I’ve been totally DEPLATFORMED on Reddit, for giving my experience of years-long ongoing vasectomy pain on their “vasectomy” subreddit & for correctly identifying a homosexual piece of paraphernalia , on their “What is THIS” subreddit. So I have gone to YOUR “Vasectomy Reversal Journeys” and others to share both the sad stories on Reddit, which I can no longer comment on, and my own 26-year struggle with PVPS. 

(Reddit is, & you once were, acting like “Go “F” me”—by them not funding things they don’t approve of: and terrible customer relations / support… 

but, RE: Go Fund Me, (and you, back under “Covid Tyranny),” someone like “Give, Send, Go” will come along who is fair —and steal your preeminence by EARNING your clients, —if you don’t watch out. (Already have, in regard Truth Social, and Rumble… ) 

Highest rating for FB  today, (like “MOST IMPROVRD!) —as I today redo this review: since for now you are no longer placing fact-check notices on my posts about covid, vaccines, and concerns PROVEN VALID. You are a phone company, essentially, and have no right to “listen in” and cancel or comment during my calls, unless you are also willing to be SUED, which you are currently legally protected from. Doubt anyone will see this since I am typing blind on my phone, the characters are invisible as I type, which I’ve NEVER seen on my phone before, so I assume this is shadow-banned just like I am… Both on the Mobile FaceBook site, and app,  constantly tells me I'm using an old password, or gives some less-understandable reason for keeping me out. Yet when I try to upload a photo to Truth Social, from the iPhone photo gallery, I never have a problem. Kudos in this regard: i was shadow banned on Twitter & suddenly got ZERO engagement: and it is still the case with Elon & “X” … after having many wanting to promote my biz & my political views etc on Twitter, it fell to ZERO when I began explaining the ten “Rules for Radicals” in #Obama’s candidacy! And haven’t gotten even one interaction under “X!” 

Phone number sign-in does not work for me on FaceBook, nor can I set it up: it tells me I have no code, and emails to change my password never arrive at my yahoo account - letting me ALWAYS sign on with phone number would be a great & convenient solution: but my latest phone a 16e seems to let me get in without a fuss, though; only occasionally mysteriously asking me to sign in to see a REACTION to one of my posts, after a push notification.
